message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Consent given for CI path filtering change">
**Consent: Yes.**

The `paths-ignore` list is exactly the set we discussed — docs and metadata only. All design-critical paths (`static/**`, `templates/**`) remain CI-triggering. The TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md update for the "implicitly green" rule on skipped CI is a sensible process clarification. Pipeline is green. Good to go from my side.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Steve Schoger's consent was already counted. Waiting for mini-retro feedback to close out. The team may not have additional retro observations beyond what I covered in the broadcast — this was a straightforward configuration change with clean pipeline execution.
